clips.title: The Fairground
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, eerie grade. An abandoned amusement park at dusk, a rusted carousel, peeling paint, weeds through the pavement, faint mist. A lone person stands unnervingly still among the dead rides, an uneasy stillness in the air. A person in a plain coat. Cold fading light, sickly haze, eerie mood, 35mm. Shallow depth of field, grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Graveyard
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, eerie grade. A foggy old graveyard at night, leaning headstones, bare trees, pale mist rolling low. A person stands among the graves with an uneasy stillness, the scene deeply unsettling. A person in a dark coat. Cold moonlight, thick fog, eerie mood, 50mm. Shallow depth of field, grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Ward
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, eerie grade. An abandoned hospital corridor, peeling walls, an overturned wheelchair, a fluorescent tube flickering and buzzing. A person stands frozen in the flickering hall, an unnerving emptiness around them. A person in plain clothes. Cold flickering light, sickly green tint, eerie mood, 35mm. Shallow depth of field, grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Attic
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, eerie grade. A dusty cluttered attic, old porcelain dolls lined on a shelf, cobwebs, a single dim bulb. A person stands amid the dolls with an uneasy stillness, the dolls' gazes unsettling. A person in casual clothes. Warm dim light, deep shadow, eerie mood, 50mm. Shallow depth of field, grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Deep End
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, eerie grade. An empty drained swimming pool at night, cracked tiles, a single flickering deck light, leaves scattered. A lone person stands at the bottom of the empty pool, an unnerving isolation. A person in plain clothes. Cold flickering light, deep shadow, eerie mood, 35mm. Shallow depth of field, grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Field
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, eerie grade. A misty cornfield at dusk, tall dry stalks, a lone tattered scarecrow, low fog. A person stands motionless among the corn near the scarecrow, an uneasy dread in the air. A person in a worn jacket. Cold fading light, drifting mist, eerie mood, 35mm. Shallow depth of field, grain, 24fps.
